title: Basal cell carcinoma: Contemporary approaches to diagnosis, treatment, and prevention.
author_string: Cameron, Michael C, Lee, Erica, Hibler, Brian P, Giordano, Cerrene N, Barker, Christopher A et al.
journal_full: Journal of the American Academy of Dermatology
abstract: As the most common human cancer worldwide and continuing to increase in incidence, basal cell carcinoma is associated with significant morbidity and cost. Continued advances in research have refined both our insight and approach to this seemingly ubiquitous disease. This 2-part continuing medical education series provides a comprehensive and contemporary review of basal cell carcinoma. The second article in this series will present both the current standard of care and newly developed approaches to diagnosis, treatment, and prevention of this disease.
